title: Compliance: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c key storage
description: Policy: 06-security.md §15.2. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c. Status: COMPLIANT. lichen_link_load_key uses secure_wipe after derivation. lichen_link_generate_key wipes seed after use. lichen_link_cleanup secure wipes all key material. SECURITY comment documents ESP32 HW RNG weakness.
notes: Links to epic: echd (Security Compliance Audit)
